mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task ( space_key, task_no, creator_no, worker_no, task_title, task_description, due_date, label_title, status_no, priority, upper_task_no, task_order, summary ) VALUES ( #{spaceKey}, seq_task_no.nextval, #{creatorNo}, #{workerNo}, #{taskTitle}, #{taskDescription}, TO_DATE(#{dueDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{labelTitle}, #{statusNo}, #{priority}, #{upperTaskNo}, ( SELECT NVL(MAX(task_order), 0) + 1 FROM task WHERE space_key = #{spaceKey} AND status_no = #{statusNo} ), #{summary} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM task WHERE space_key = #{spaceKey} AND task_no = #{taskNo}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM task WHERE space_key = #{spaceKey} ORDER BY task_order ASC
SELECT * FROM task WHERE space_key = #{spaceKey} AND upper_task_no IS NULL ORDER BY task_order ASC
SELECT * FROM task WHERE space_key = #{spaceKey} AND upper_task_no = #{upperTaskNo} ORDER BY task_order ASC
